scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format && pnpm typecheck
scripts.guard:no-cards-in-pipeline-tracker: if grep -rE 'class[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z0-9_]+Card\b' pipeline-tracker/src/; then echo 'ERROR: card classes must live in @cs/scraping-core (spec 011 phase 5 guard)'; exit 1; else echo 'OK: no card classes in pipeline-tracker/src/'; fi
scripts.guard:no-raw-storage-local: if grep -rnE 'chrome\.storage\.local\.(get|set|remove|clear)\b' pipeline-tracker/src/ --exclude=storage.ts | grep -v 'pipeline-tracker/src/storage.ts'; then echo 'ERROR: raw chrome.storage.local access must go through storage.ts (spec 012 phase 1 guard)'; exit 1; else echo 'OK: chrome.storage.local only used inside storage.ts'; fi
scripts.guard:no-fetch-in-publishable: pnpm build:pipeline-tracker:publishable && if grep -rnE --include='*.js' '\bfetch\s*\(|XMLHttpRequest' pipeline-tracker/dist-publishable/; then echo 'ERROR: publishable bundle contains fetch()/XMLHttpRequest (spec 012 phase 4 guard #3 — publishable build must not initiate network calls)'; exit 1; else echo 'OK: no fetch/XMLHttpRequest in publishable bundle'; fi
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && pnpm typecheck:functions && pnpm typecheck:extension && pnpm typecheck:pipeline-tracker && pnpm typecheck:packages
scripts.dev:functions: doppler secrets download --no-file --format env-no-quotes > /tmp/skool-funcs.env && supabase functions serve --env-file /tmp/skool-funcs.env
scripts.package:extension: doppler run -p skool -c prd -- tsx scripts/package-extension.ts
